nodes.label: AI as resource creation tool for diverse questions
nodes.grounding_span: creating resources such as additional starter questions, worksheet, exam style questions and homeworks

nodes.label: AI as time-saving efficiency tool
nodes.grounding_span: allows me to save lots of time as creating math questions can be time consuming

nodes.label: AI as enhancer of resource quality
nodes.grounding_span: created a higher quality resource as a result

nodes.label: Authentic teacher voice in solutions
nodes.grounding_span: I still need to solve problems myself and I will still provide my own solutions as it will appear more authentic

nodes.label: AI as facilitator of student practice
nodes.grounding_span: Creating more questions gives students a chance to experience a wider range of style of question

nodes.label: AI for administrative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I don't use AI for admin as much as I would like to, this mostly due to the system we use wouldn't be compatible

nodes.label: Educator as facilitator vs lecturer
nodes.grounding_span: my role as an educator to be one of a facilitator rather than a lecturer

nodes.label: Student learning and understanding
nodes.grounding_span: check they are still learning and understanding the content

nodes.label: Time efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: allows me to save lots of time

nodes.label: Authenticity and personal connection
nodes.grounding_span: appear more authentic and will appear in a more familiar style to students

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for resource creation
nodes.grounding_span: creating the escape room activity recently went really well

nodes.label: Frustration with AI for admin tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I don't use AI for admin as much as I would like to

nodes.label: Optimism about AI for marking
nodes.grounding_span: Marking is an area in particular I want to explore more

nodes.label: Preference for personal solutions
nodes.grounding_span: I still need to solve problems myself and I will still provide my own solutions

nodes.label: Iterative refinement — starts minimal then adjusts
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to start minimal to see what it will produce and if that isn't to my standard, I will give some follow ups

nodes.label: Strategic scaffolding — adapts difficulty based on student confidence
nodes.grounding_span: if they are really struggling, I will get AI to create one that is close to the original but if they are getting more confident, I will try and use AI to add extra layers of difficultly
